title: frame.py: addr_len property creates dict on every access
description:
src/lichen/link/frame.py:38-42 AddrMode.addr_len property creates a new dict on every property access:
    {AddrMode.NONE: 0, AddrMode.SHORT: 2, ...}[self]

For a property called during frame parsing, this is wasteful. Should be a module-level constant or class attribute.
